strategyResults.details: 80 tests across 6 files green (12 distill + 8 CLI + 60 state)

generatorFeedback.description: C1 fixture test asserts length>0 rather than an exact toHaveLength(N); a future distill() change dropping/adding a lesson group would not be caught. Add exact-count assertion. Non-blocking; evaluator passed C1 on substance (cross-call stability + category correctness proven). DOCUMENTED FOLLOW-UP.

summary: All 5 required criteria pass. Evaluator built+ran the real CLI end-to-end (distill/list/show) confirming count summaries, on-disk idempotency (2nd run 0 new), bounded list, and show provenance. distill() pure: sha256 hash over category+tags+refs excluding createdAt, no providers import, no clock. typecheck/build/lint exit 0; 80 tests green; pipeline.ts clean; history.ts/memory.ts unchanged. Low-priority: C1 test lacks exact-count assertion (documented follow-up).
